title: glyceria plicata subsp. declinata
intro: Glyceria plicata subsp. declinata, also known as the bent grass or small leaved bent, is a subspecies of the Glyceria plicata plant, which belongs to the grass family Poaceae. Traditionally, the roots and leaves of Glyceria plicata subsp. declinata have been used in herbal medicine, and they are said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The medicinal properties of this plant are believed to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. In terms of herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of Glyceria plicata subsp. declinata are often dried and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures.
